bio: Detail-oriented analytical chemist with a passion for developing sustainable chemical processes and advancing pharmaceutical research. Experienced in laboratory experimentation, data analysis, and cross-disciplinary collaboration.
name: MAYA R. BENNETT
title: Analytical Chemist & Research Scientist

projects.title: Green Chemistry Optimizer
projects.description: A data-driven platform that analyzes chemical reaction pathways to recommend environmentally friendly alternatives.

projects.title: PharmaTrack Analytics
projects.description: A dashboard for monitoring drug stability and degradation patterns across varying environmental conditions.

projects.title: Water Quality Monitoring System
projects.description: An integrated system that collects and analyzes water samples to detect contaminants in real time.
